title: Worktree Isolation
description: Task ownership now includes an isolated filesystem and audit trail.

steps.content: Give the refactor task its own isolated workspace and log the handoff.
steps.annotation: This request touches both filesystem isolation and runtime observability.
The runtime provisions a dedicated workspace for that task.
Task ownership now includes a separate filesystem view.

steps.content: {"task_id":"task-9","event":"handoff","details":"Assigned isolated workspace to the refactor task"}
steps.annotation: The event log records why the isolated workspace exists.
Isolation is paired with an audit trail.

steps.content: The refactor task now has its own workspace and a recorded lifecycle event describing the handoff.
steps.annotation: Isolation becomes a first-class runtime capability instead of an ad hoc trick.
